_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Conflicting signals — bullish stablecoin/MVRV undercurrent vs bearish funding and directional-accuracy track record — cancel out into a choppy Anxiety-range hold until either fear collapses to confirm a bottom or ETF momentum breaks out to invalidate it.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction while narrative implies accumulation/long bias at 0.78 confidence; consensus sides with the analyst's higher trust weight and stricter read.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 AND funding collapses below 35 with stablecoin growth accelerating above 55
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows sustain above 90 AND btc_momentum_30d breaks above 65 with funding rising above 60
